sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97522" key="su/gghros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύγγηρ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n97522.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">growing old with</tr_> another, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.260</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Carph.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0150.tlg001:635" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">635</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
